description: Update references/escalation-phase.md to document concurrent python execution, parallel error handling, and isolated log locations.
context_ref: The auditor failed because references/escalation-phase.md still references sequential bash execution. Update the escalation protocol to reflect concurrent Python runner (dag_runner.py), worker pool constraints, event loop cancellation, and log files in .specs/runs/[ID]/logs/[Task_ID].log.
cognitive_rationale: Directly address the auditor failure by replacing sequential bash documentation with parallel python executor facts.
done_when_gate: agy --dangerously-skip-permissions --prompt "Role: Independent Auditor. Evaluate if the code in references/escalation-phase.md strictly obeys this rule: 'The escalation documentation must accurately reflect the concurrent Python execution model (dag_runner.py), parallel error handling (such as worker pool limits and drain-running/cancellation), and isolated logs located at .specs/runs/[ID]/logs/[Task_ID].log. Sequential bash references must be removed.'. Do not read external context files. Respond EXACTLY with PASS or FAIL: <reason>"
